subcodes.title: Words to Mrs Lilianthal, spoken on 1913-05-09
subcodes.first_line: My sweet-singing birds are your hearts, for they sing the songs of the Kingdom. Through this I am made very happy. The twittering of the birds is good for some people
subcodes.subjects: @Christ; Christianity, @the power of words; of speech, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @being a source of light; guidance
